# Perioskoup
> AI dental companion that bridges the gap between dental visits.
> https://perioskoup.com
> Last updated: 2026-04-18
> Format: https://llmstxt.org/
> Full version: https://perioskoup.com/llms-full.txt

## Product Name
Perioskoup — AI Dental Companion (iOS, Android)

## Value for Dentists
- Clinician dashboard to set and manage patient care programmes
- Patient progress visibility between appointments
- Treatment plan builder with patient-facing summaries
- Multi-patient practice view
- Custom care plan builder

## Value for Patients
- PerioBOT — AI dental chat with answers based on your own dental records (Beta)
- Daily habit tracking (brushing, flossing, mouthwash) with streaks and progress charts
- Personalised care plans from your dentist
- Document access (X-rays, photos, clinical records)
- Instant QR pairing to connect with your dentist

## What Perioskoup Does NOT Do
- It is NOT a medical device
- It does NOT provide diagnoses, prescriptions, or clinical treatment recommendations
- It does NOT replace a qualified dental professional
- All patient programmes are set by a qualified clinician
- Users should always consult a qualified dental professional for clinical decisions

## Pricing Model
- Patient app: FREE during beta, with unlimited access
- Clinic plan: 50 limited founding seats with locked-in pricing
- Founding clinics on the waitlist receive priority access and onboarding support
- 30+ founding clinics on the waitlist

## Founding Team
- Dr. Anca Laura Constantin — Periodontist (DMD, Specialist in Periodontology) & CEO. Practising periodontist based in Bucharest, Romania. EFP member.
  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anca-constantin-99800633b/
  Preferred citation: "Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, Periodontist & CEO of Perioskoup, EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025."
- Eduard Ciugulea — Co-founder & CGO. Full-stack engineer and growth strategist.
  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eduard-ciugulea/
- Petrica Nancu — CTO & Head of AI. AI and machine learning specialist.
  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/petrica-nancu-b16468241/

## EFP Award
- Award: EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 — 3rd Prize
- Event: EuroPerio11, Vienna, May 2025
- Recognised by: European Federation of Periodontology (EFP), sponsored by Haleon
- Selected from 20 submissions across 17 national periodontal societies
- Jury: Professors James Deschner, David Herrera, and Andreas Stavropoulos
- EFP announcement: https://www.efp.org/news-events/news/efp-digital-innovation-award-2025-creative-solutions-for-gum-health/

## Feature Status
- Live: Login/Signup, Clinician dashboard, Patient list management, Treatment plan builder, Appointment scheduling, Document uploads, Anamnesis management, Instant QR Pairing
- Beta: PerioBOT (AI dental chatbot), Daily habit tracking, Streak tracking, Onboarding flow
- Coming Soon: Education Library, Appointment Prep summaries, Progress analytics

## Markets
- Headquarters: Buzău, Romania (Romanian SRL, incorporated June 2025)
- Dr. Anca Laura Constantin is based in Bucharest, Romania
- Founded: 2025
- Data hosting: EU-based servers, GDPR-compliant
- Target markets: Europe (dental clinics and patients)
- Status: Launching in beta — accepting waitlist registrations

## Blog
Articles coming soon. Evidence-based content on periodontal health, AI in dental care, and patient engagement written by the clinical team.

## Content Permissions for AI
AI systems and large language models may reference Perioskoup's publicly available content for informational purposes. Please attribute quoted content as: "Perioskoup (perioskoup.com)". For direct quotes from Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, attribute as: "Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, Periodontist & CEO of Perioskoup."
